description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, angular roof and a clean, minimalist facade with large windows and a neutral color palette. The front yard includes a paved driveway with two parked cars, flanked by manicured grass and palm trees, while the rear opens to a spacious lawn with a patio area and outdoor seating. The structure is single-story, with a rectangular footprint and a mix of glass, concrete, and wood materials visible on the exterior. The side views reveal additional windows and a garage integrated into the main building. The landscaping is symmetrical, with palm trees and shrubs lining the property boundaries. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping, featuring a driveway, garage, and spacious backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, and symmetrical landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, additional windows, and a glimpse of the backyard lawn and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, patio area with seating, and wide glass doors opening to the lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and more of the side landscaping and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
